description_long: This is a portable Sony CD player boombox with a robust, rectangular body and a large, arched carrying handle on top. The front panel features a digital display, a set of control buttons, and a CD compartment lid, as well as two integrated speaker grilles on either side. The top surface has additional control buttons and a circular CD tray cover, while the back panel includes a battery compartment and various input/output ports. The device is primarily constructed from molded plastic with metallic speaker grilles and some rubberized elements on the handle. The color scheme is mostly dark gray with silver accents, and the overall design is utilitarian and functional, suitable for urban environments. The object appears sturdy and is designed for easy transport and frequent handling.
description: A portable Sony CD player boombox with a large handle, front control panel, and integrated speakers in a dark gray and silver color scheme.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel, digital display, CD tray lid, and speaker grilles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the body and the profile of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the battery compartment, input/output ports, and the back of the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the curvature of the body and the side profile of the control buttons.
